sub_agent_reviews.summary: Only sources with dates inside 2026-05-31 to 2026-06-06 were kept.
Each selected source was expanded into a standalone Markdown analysis document with deep reading notes, section-by-section interpretation, and follow-up questions.
Agent SDK, post-training infra, and safety blueprint were each mapped to a reusable workflow or system view.
Evidence and limits were called out explicitly for every article instead of only summarizing claims.
External references were searched by content type; blog/report items preserve the original argument and use short quotations only as analysis anchors.
All analysis pages were written as Markdown documents; styling and formula rendering are handled by the web app.
